records.question: Which players named Dennis Nutt who are guards from TCU were born in the USA and have a race of W?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
WHERE players.race = 'W' AND players.birthcountry = 'USA' AND players.pos = 'G' AND players.college = 'TCU' AND players.firstname = 'Dennis' AND players.lastname = 'Nutt'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT playerID
FROM players
WHERE race = 'W' 
  AND birthCountry = 'USA' 
  AND pos = 'G' 
  AND college = 'TCU' 
  AND firstName = 'Dennis' 
  AND lastName = 'Nutt'

records.question: Who are the players with the last name Netolicky who played in the ABA, had a last season of at least 0.0, and have a death date exactly on 0000-00-00?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
JOIN awards_players ON players.playerid = awards_players.playerid
WHERE players.lastname = 'Netolicky' AND awards_players.lgid = 'ABA' AND players.lastseason >= 0.0 AND players.deathdate = '0000-00-00'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.playerID
FROM players p
WHERE p.lastName = 'Netolicky'
  AND p.lastseason >= 0.0
  AND p.deathDate = '0000-00-00'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM awards_players ap
    WHERE ap.playerID = p.playerID
      AND ap.lgID = 'ABA'
  )

records.question: What players have the middle name Harding and have received awards as well as been selected as All-Stars?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
JOIN awards_players ON players.playerid = awards_players.playerid
JOIN player_allstar ON players.playerid = player_allstar.playerid
WHERE players.middlename = 'Harding'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.playerID
FROM players p
WHERE p.middleName = 'Harding'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM awards_players ap 
    WHERE ap.playerID = p.playerID
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM player_allstar pa 
    WHERE pa.playerID = p.playerID
)

records.question: Which players have the position C, were born in the USA, are named Chuck, started playing in season 0.0 or later, and died on or before 2012-06-07?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
WHERE players.pos = 'C' AND players.hscountry = 'USA' AND players.usefirst = 'Chuck' AND players.firstseason >= 0.0 AND players.deathdate <= '2012-06-07'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT playerID
FROM players
WHERE pos = 'C' 
  AND hsCountry = 'USA' 
  AND useFirst = 'Chuck' 
  AND firstseason >= 0.0 
  AND deathDate <= '2012-06-07'

records.question: Which players named Timothy Theodore from ISV have won the All-Defensive Second Team award and recorded at most 7 offensive rebounds, at most 1 steal, and no more than 0 free throws made in all-star games?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
JOIN awards_players ON players.playerid = awards_players.playerid
JOIN player_allstar ON players.playerid = player_allstar.playerid
WHERE awards_players.award = 'All-Defensive Second Team' AND players.firstname = 'Timothy' AND players.hscountry = 'ISV' AND player_allstar.o_rebounds <= 7.0 AND player_allstar.steals <= 1.0 AND players.middlename = 'Theodore' AND player_allstar.ft_made <= 0.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.playerID
FROM players p
WHERE p.firstName = 'Timothy'
  AND p.hsCountry = 'ISV'
  AND p.middleName = 'Theodore'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM awards_players ap
    WHERE ap.playerID = p.playerID
      AND ap.award = 'All-Defensive Second Team'
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM player_allstar pa
    WHERE pa.playerID = p.playerID
      AND pa.o_rebounds <= 7.0
      AND pa.steals <= 1.0
      AND pa.ft_made <= 0.0
  )

records.question: Who are the players from UNLV whose position is exactly F and have received any awards?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
JOIN awards_players ON players.playerid = awards_players.playerid
WHERE players.college = 'UNLV' AND players.pos = 'F'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.playerID
FROM players p
INNER JOIN awards_players ap ON p.playerID = ap.playerID
WHERE p.college = 'UNLV' AND p.pos = 'F'

records.question: What players named John J. who were born in the USA, went to Bridgeport High School and Ohio State, and have won the All-NBA Second Team award but have no recorded death date are there?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
JOIN awards_players ON players.playerid = awards_players.playerid
WHERE awards_players.award = 'All-NBA Second Team' AND players.college = 'Ohio State' AND players.birthcountry = 'USA' AND players.usefirst = 'John' AND players.middlename = 'J.' AND players.deathdate = '0000-00-00' AND players.highschool = 'Bridgeport'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.playerID
FROM players p
INNER JOIN awards_players ap ON p.playerID = ap.playerID
WHERE p.college = 'Ohio State'
  AND p.birthCountry = 'USA'
  AND p.useFirst = 'John'
  AND p.middleName = 'J.'
  AND p.deathDate = '0000-00-00'
  AND p.highSchool = 'Bridgeport'
  AND ap.award = 'All-NBA Second Team'
